name: Budwix Cream
recipeInstructions:
1. Budwix is a mixture of millet, almonds and flax seed.
2. You can use plain yogurt or Quark cheese instead of cottage cheese. Other seasonal fruits can be used instead of banana.
3. In a blender, grind the grain-and-nut mixture until homogeneous but gritty.
4. Add oil, cottage cheese, lemon juice, honey and fruit to the mixture in the blender.
5. Blend until smooth and serve immediately.
